name: rune-kit
description: Less skills. Deeper connections. A lean, interconnected skill ecosystem for Claude Code — 66 skills, 248 connections, 45 signals, and runtime auto-discipline.

plugins.name: rune
plugins.description: 66 skills wired into a 5-layer mesh — 248 connections + 45 signals, adaptive routing, mesh analytics, logic preservation, and native lifecycle hooks. The compiler targets 13 runtimes including Claude Code and OpenAI Codex.
